summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of VitalSense AI ICU monitoring system completed successfully. All core features working: authentication, doctor/patient management, real-time vitals dashboard, alerts system, and risk engine.

minor_issues.issue: Admin user already registered from previous test runs
Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Both codes indicate authentication failure correctly

passed_tests: Login page renders with Sign In/Register toggle
Register new user with email/password/name/role
Login with registered credentials (admin@hospital.com)
Dashboard page shows patient grid after login
Patient cards display vitals (HR: 97, BP: 100/60, SpO2: 96, Temp: 37.4, RR: 22)
Patient cards show ECG waveforms
Doctor Management - Add new doctor form works
Doctor Management - Shows existing doctors in grid
Patient Management - Shows patient table with existing data
Patient Management - Add patient button present
Alerts page shows alert timeline with 15 alerts
Critical alerts displayed (Tachypnea, High fever, Hypertension, Low SpO2)
Patient Detail page shows real-time vitals and graphs
Risk engine working (LOW risk level, score 0)
Backend API endpoints: POST/GET /api/doctors working
Backend API endpoints: POST/GET /api/patients working
Backend API endpoints: GET /api/alerts working
JWT authentication working across all pages
Real-time vitals simulation active
Dark medical theme applied correctly
